AU_ADVANCEDBSCHEMA.tempString: <entry key = "-1"> <entry key = 'contractdetails'><sql name = 'contractdetails' key = '' fkey = '' updateKey ='ContractID' schemaName ='' >SELECT ContractID,AgreementNumber,FeedNumber,Partner,UniqueMarketReferenceNumber,ProgramAdministrator,Intermediary,InceptionDate,ExpiryDate,CoverholderCommission,Coinsurance,CoinsurerName,AIGSharePercent,PersonResponsibleForOverallOperation,PersonAuthorisedToBindInsurances,PersonWithOverallResponsibility,OtherConditions,Region,Division,ProducerCode,AnnualStatementCompanyName,Status,Initiated,Approver,Created_Date,Created_By,Last_Modified_Date,Last_Modified_By,Approved_Date,comments,network_id,gross_premium_limit,currency_gross_premium,notifiable_premium_percent,network_name,project_id,project_name FROM "contractdetails"</sql> <entry key = 'coverholder_address'><sql name = 'coverholder_address' key = 'ContractID' fkey = 'ContractID' updateKey ='ID' schemaName ='' >SELECT ID,ContractID,coverholder_program_administrator_address FROM "coverholder_address"</sql> </entry> </entry> </entry>

<xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <query>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]SELECT ContractID,AgreementNumber,FeedNumber,Partner,UniqueMarketReferenceNumber,ProgramAdministrator,Intermediary,InceptionDate,ExpiryDate,CoverholderCommission,Coinsurance,CoinsurerName,AIGSharePercent,PersonResponsibleForOverallOperation,PersonAuthorisedToBindInsurances,PersonWithOverallResponsibility,OtherConditions,Region,Division,ProducerCode,AnnualStatementCompanyName,Status,Initiated,Approver,Created_Date,Created_By,Last_Modified_Date,Last_Modified_By,Approved_Date,comments,network_id,gross_premium_limit,currency_gross_premium,notifiable_premium_percent,network_name,project_id,project_name
